channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters union to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The AI race is already taking a toll. Ireland’s massive data centers are a cautionary tale
item.description: Dozens of massive data centers humming at the outskirts of Dublin are consuming more electricity than all of the urban homes in Ireland and starting to wear out the warm welcome that brought them here.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Amazon Workers Strike at Seven Delivery Hubs Ahead of Christmas
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union launch a strike at seven delivery hubs less than a week before Christmas, demanding higher wages, better benefits, and safer work conditions.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Bitcoin Founder Contempt Case: Craig Wright Sentenced to 12 Months
item.description: Australian computer scientist Craig Wright found guilty of contempt of court for falsely claiming to be the founder of bitcoin, sentenced to 12 months in prison.
item.dc:creator: Pan Pylas, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Elon Musk considers funding Nigel Farage's populist party, a move that could shake up UK politics
item.description: British politician Nigel Farage says talks are underway about Elon Musk making a hefty donation to Farage’s party Reform U.K. The Times of London reported it could be as much as $100 million, which would be the largest political donation in U.K. history.
item.dc:creator: Jill Lawless, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Amazon workers to strike at multiple sites: Teamsters
item.description: The International Brotherhood of Teamsters union announced Amazon workers would strike starting Thursday in five confirmed states ahead of the Christmas holiday, citing the company’s absence from the bargaining negotiations as a reason.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union's intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Thousands of GPS tracking customers have info leaked following data breach
item.description: A bug in Hapn's website is allegedly spilling sensitive information, while the company remains silent.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: These 5 clever mapping upstarts do what Google Maps can’t
item.description: Look, Google Maps is fine. It’s arguably even great—probably one of the most-opened apps on lots of our phones and absolutely one of the most indispensable.
item.dc:creator: JR Raphael, Fast Company

item.title: Climate tech opportunities for IT pros
item.description: In what can only be labeled as a very encouraging trend, jobs and projects abound for tech professionals wanting to use their skills and expertise to try and make our planet and climate well again.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: IT firms recognise the gender gap, but not all have plans to fix it
item.description: Businesses aren’t doing enough to support women in tech, but here’s what they could be doing to contribute.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Elon Musk's Push Against Stopgap Measure Receives Mixed Reactions from House Republicans
item.description: Elon Musk's aggressive push against a stopgap measure to prevent a government shutdown received mixed reactions from House Republicans, with President-elect Trump and Vice President-elect Vance announcing their opposition to the measure.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: 5 job negotiation tips for CAIOs
item.description: The CAIO is becoming more of a strategically important role for most if not all organizations as they look to capitalize on the promise of AI technologies across the enterprise.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Enterprise-grade caching with Azure Managed Redis
item.description: Microsoft has made a lot of big bets in its preferred cloud-native infrastructure. You only need to look at .
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Create searchable Bluesky bookmarks with R
item.description: The Bluesky social network is seeping into the mainstream, thanks in part to people unhappy with changes at X (formerly Twitter). “It’s not some untouched paradise, but it’s got a spark of something refreshing,” Jan Beger, global head of AI Advocacy at GE HealthCare, posted on LinkedIn last month.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The US egg industry kills 350 million chicks a year. New technology offers an alternative
item.description: Every year the U.S. egg industry kills about 350 million male chicks because they will never lay eggs and so have little monetary value.
item.dc:creator: Scott Mcfetridge, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Salesforce’s Agentforce 2.0 update aims to make AI agents smarter
item.description: Salesforce has updated its agentic AI platform, Agentforce, to help enterprises build and deploy better agents, faster, across systems and workflows. Agentforce 2.0 is the second release of the agentic AI platform in two months.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Flipboard’s new app is a discovery engine for the decentralized web
item.description: Fourteen years ago, when the iPad was new and bursting with unfulfilled promise, an app called Flipboard debuted.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: 4 gains Big Tech is hoping for in Trump’s second term
item.description: In a string of visits, dinners, calls, monetary pledges, and social media overtures, big tech chiefs—including Apple’s Tim Cook, OpenAI’s Sam Altman, Meta’s Mark Zuckerberg, SoftBank’s Masayoshi Son, and Amazon’s Jeff Bezos—have joined a parade of business and world leaders in trying to improve thei
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: VA EHR seeing fewer crashes amid plans to resume rollout in FY 2025
item.description: VA’s Oracle-Cerner EHR has seen a 50% decrease in crashes and lags since the VA completed its last round of updates in August. The post VA EHR seeing fewer crashes amid plans to resume rollout in FY 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: Slack adds Agentforce ‘hub’ for AI agents
item.description: Slack is adding a new way to access AI agents created on parent company Salesforce’s Agentforce platform, with a library of options available in the collaboration app. Agentforce, which launched in October, is a tool to build AI agents that answer questions and automate tasks for users.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to work with text colors on Linux
item.description: When you list files on the Linux command line, many of the file names show up in colors, as you’ve probably noticed. The colors used depend on the file types. For example, the names of directories will show up in a blue font.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Anti-deepfake porn bill included in funding deal
item.description: A bill that seeks to fight the rise of deepfake pornography was included in the year-end government funding deal unveiled Tuesday, raising the prospect the legislation could cross the finish line in the coming days.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — The Barcelona subway grinds to a halt, the doors slide open and commuters pour out to go about their daily business. Little do they know that as they do so, a burst of energy is sent up to street level to help charge an electric car.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 4 steps to streamline enterprise cloud spending
item.description: The proliferation of cloud computing has fundamentally reshaped how enterprises handle their critical workloads, transforming the cloud into a strategic tool and business enabler.
item.dc:creator: Info World
